title: Add input sanitization to the task creation endpoint
prompt: The POST /api/tasks endpoint accepts arbitrary string payloads. Add input length limits, strip leading/trailing whitespace from the title and description fields, and reject any payload where the title exceeds 500 characters or the description exceeds 5000 characters. Return HTTP 422 with a structured error. Add tests. Ensure the change does not break existing tests.

rubric.notes: Security-relevant input validation change. Adversarial review is required. High-risk.
